$description: Elevation shadows and the focus ring. card/card-hover/overlay/pop are live --folia-* tokens (byte-match the .folia-root block). ring/panel are NEW token homes for shadows currently raw outside the block (no --folia-* var yet).

ring.$description: Focus ring. NEW home for the box-shadow repeated 8x outside the block (the 30% variant; the lone 25% at styles.css:716 is a one-off, not this token). CSS adoption pending.

panel.$description: Unique side-panel shadow (styles.css:1046). NEW home; CSS adoption pending.
